title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 252.160 - Fraudulently securing license, penalty
text:
252.160.  Fraudulently securing license, penalty. — Any person who shall obtain or cause to be issued any certificate, license, or privilege from this state or any political subdivision thereof, or from any licensing or certifying organization authorized to certify or license by the laws of this state, by any deceit, shall, upon conviction, be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 8919, A.L. 1945 p. 664 § 16, A.L. 1953 p. 316) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8259; 1919 § 5608; 1909 § 6582
